headline: Futu's Account Push: Can It Reach 800,000 New Funded Clients?
summary: Futu adds 225,000 funded accounts in Q1, but reaching its 800,000 goal now hinges on steady growth across overseas markets.

headline: Interactive Brokers Expands AI Integration Capabilities – Adding ChatGPT and Grok to Its Growing Suite of Agentic Trading Tools
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 22, 2026--Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR)announced the expansion of its agentic trading capabilities with the addition of ChatGPT and Grok.

headline: Interactive Brokers Adds ChatGPT, Grok Into Its Operations
summary: Interactive Brokers (NASDAQ:IBKR), an automated global broker, today announced the expansion of its agentic trading capabilities with the addition of ChatGPT and Grok, further broadening a growing ecosystem of AI
